title: ds-viz-ellipse - option matrix (light)
description: Light-theme companion. Test bench for splunk.ellipse. Verifies every option from the 10.4 PDF: fillColor, fillOpacity, strokeColor, strokeDashStyle, strokeOpacity, strokeWidth. Demonstrates circles vs ellipses (set by panel aspect ratio), status dots, KPI accent rings, faint background blobs, and donut-style accent rings.

options.markdown:
# `splunk.ellipse` - option matrix (light)

Ellipses are absolute-layout shapes with **6 options** total. They are the workhorse for **circular badges**, **status dots**, **KPI accent rings**, **faint background blobs**, and **decorative highlights**.

Unlike rectangles, ellipses have no `rx` / `ry` / `strokeJoinStyle` - shape is set entirely by the **panel aspect ratio**:

- panel `w == h` => circle
- panel `w != h` => ellipse (oval)

All options from the **10.4 PDF**:
- `fillColor` (string, hex; theme default)
- `fillOpacity` (0 - 1)
- `strokeColor` (string, hex; theme default)
- `strokeDashStyle` (number; pixel length of dashes & gaps; `0` = solid)
- `strokeOpacity` (0 - 1)
- `strokeWidth` (1 - 25 px)

viz_default.title: 1. Default (theme defaults)
viz_default.description: No options set. Square panel => circle. Theme default fill #C3CBD4, stroke #3C444D in enterprise dark.

viz_circle_solid.title: 2. Circle - solid fill
viz_circle_solid.description: Square panel + custom fillColor + transparent stroke. Most common circular badge.

viz_ellipse_oval.title: 3. Ellipse - oval (panel w != h)
viz_ellipse_oval.description: Wide panel => horizontal oval. Ellipses inherit the panel aspect ratio.

viz_fill_opacity_half.title: 4. fillOpacity = 0.5
viz_fill_opacity_half.description: 50% fill - layered atop a coloured canvas, lets it bleed through.

viz_fill_opacity_faint.title: 5. fillOpacity = 0.15 (faint blob)
viz_fill_opacity_faint.description: Decorative background watermark. Pair with markdown overlay.

viz_outline.title: 6. strokeColor + strokeWidth
viz_outline.description: Outlined ring - transparent fill, brand stroke. The classic 'donut accent'.

viz_stroke_thick.title: 7. strokeWidth = 25 (max)
viz_stroke_thick.description: Maximum stroke width per the PDF. Anything above 25 is clipped.

viz_stroke_dashed.title: 8. strokeDashStyle = 6
viz_stroke_dashed.description: Dashed ring - 6px dashes, 6px gaps. Useful for empty / placeholder states.

viz_stroke_opacity.title: 9. strokeOpacity = 0.4
viz_stroke_opacity.description: Soft accent ring - solid fill, faded stroke. Common KPI surround.

viz_status_dot_ok.title: 10a. Status dot OK
viz_status_dot_ok.description: Tiny circle for status indicators. Pair with markdown label.

viz_kpi_ring.title: 11. KPI accent ring
viz_kpi_ring.description: Background ring with a contrasting accent stroke and a singleValue layered on top. Demonstrates the canonical 'ring + KPI' recipe.

viz_kpi_value.title: Uptime
viz_kpi_value.description: singleValue layered on top of viz_kpi_ring.
